invoice cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists invoice_line_item cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists payment_settings cascade Hibernate: create table credit_card (exp_month integer, exp_year integer, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone, customer_id uuid, id uuid not null, brand varchar(255), gateway_code varchar(255), last_numbers varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table invoice (total_amount numeric(38,2), canceled_at timestamp(6) with time zone, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone, expires_at timestamp(6) with time zone, issue_date timestamp(6) with time zone, last_modified_date timestamp(6) with time zone, paid_at timestamp(6) with time zone, version bigint not null, created_by_user_id uuid, customer_id uuid, id uuid not null, last_modified_by_user_id uuid, payment_settings_id uuid unique, cancel_reason varchar(255), order_id varchar(255), payer_address_city varchar(255), payer_address_complement varchar(255), payer_address_neighborhood varchar(255), payer_address_number varchar(255), payer_address_state varchar(255), payer_address_street varchar(255), payer_address_zip_code varchar(255), payer_document varchar(255), payer_email varchar(255), payer_full_name varchar(255), payer_phone varchar(255), status enum ('CANCELED','PAID','UNPAID'), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table invoice_line_item ("items_amount" numeric(38,2), "items_number" integer, invoice_id uuid not null, "items_name" varchar(255)) Hibernate: create table payment_settings (credit_card_id uuid, id uuid not null, gateway_code varchar(255), method enum ('CREDIT_CARD','GATEWAY_BALANCE'), primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists invoice add constraint FKc3y0lyg3tb97vai59q7ogi6f0 foreign key (payment_settings_id) references payment_settings Hibernate: alter table if exists invoice_line_item add constraint FK4560gqjs1jn62cp4govj4akb3 foreign key (invoice_id) references invoice 2026-05-27T18:14:26.554-03:00 INFO 2430 ---
